summary: Evaluator verified all 24 manifest hashes, independently re-ran the pwsh suite twice (25 ok, exit 0, PowerShell 7.6.2), confirmed genuine red->green (red fails at the new local-env-mcp placement assertion, tests line 919), and line-level verified ps1/sh parity: identical Node -e JSON upsert one-liner (byte-parity), -Mcp default/ValidateSet covering both MCPs, Node>=20 gate over the whole selection, per-OS VS Code paths with overrides, and the corrupt-JSON fail-safe (Write-Error -ErrorAction Continue under Stop preference) leaving files byte-identical while the other client registers and the installer exits zero. Verdict PASS with one Minor.

findings.description: Unrelated working-tree edit to docs/workflow-improvements/WFI-001.md (pre-existing orchestrator change, disclosed in Working Notes) is outside T-008 scope and not part of the task Outputs binding; noted for cleanliness only.

note: Full evaluator output (including the checked-verifications list) is preserved in the orchestrating session transcript.
